prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约387名、1325名、1259名、305名、308名。2022–2023年因专业组拆分（W500组要求化学选科）导致位次大幅后移至1300名左右，2024年起合并为单一选科组（物理+化学）后位次迅速回稳至305–308名，近两年基本持平，2025年基准位次约308名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021年14人、2022年32人、2023年48人、2024年26人、2025年25人；2026年计划25人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第4名（2021–2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿量较高）及校园安全事件；抖音综合热度排名第42位（较热），曝光量中等；2021年曾出现投档线异常信号（河南理科华五倒数第一），但近年未见明显断档记录。整体声誉对报考热度影响偏中性略负面；拥有A+学科8个（机械工程、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、生物学、工商管理、管理科学与工程、外国语言文学、临床医学等），A/A-学科20个，A-及以上共28个，学科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度关联（计算机、电子信息、机械、金融等均为强势学科覆盖方向）。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，人工智能类谨慎观望；福建省2026年高考总人数约26.79万，较2025年（约25.23万）增加约6.2%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约20.36万，较2025年（19.21万）增加约1.15万人（增幅约6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争，2025年物理类本科批441分，特殊类型招生控制线520分；上海交通大学校本部位于上海市，非福建省本地高校；该校在福建省招生占比约3.9%（2024年30人/全国759人），属中等偏低水平，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次稳定在305–308名的走势、2026年招生计划持平、福建省物理类考生增加约6%导致竞争加剧、学校顶尖层次维持高吸引力、声誉偏负面产生轻微抑制作用等因素，在，考虑考生规模扩大带来的竞争加剧效应，预测2026年物理类最低位次约为323名，较2025年小幅后移（位次数字增大），区间273–373名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 387, 1325, 1259, 305, and 308 respectively. In 2022–2023, due to the splitting of major groups (Group W500 required Chemistry selection), rankings significantly dropped to around 1300. Starting from 2024, after merging into a single selection group (Physics + Chemistry), rankings quickly stabilized to 305–308, remaining nearly unchanged in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of about 308 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Fujian Province was 14 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 25 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 25, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (2021–2026), placing it among the top-tier universities in China, strongly attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (relatively high retraction rate) and campus safety incidents. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot), with moderate exposure. In 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (Henan理科 Huawu ranked last), but no significant gaps have been observed in recent years. Overall, the reputation has a slightly negative to neutral impact on application enthusiasm. It has 8 A+ disciplines (Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Biology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Clinical Medicine, etc.), 20 A/A- disciplines, and a total of 28 A- and above disciplines, with top-tier academic strength highly correlated with its enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, Finance, etc., all covered by strong disciplines).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, while Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Fujian Province is approximately 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% from 2025 (approximately 252,300). Based on historical proportions, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 203,600, an increase of about 11,500 (approximately 6%) from 2025 (192,100). The expansion of the examinee pool intensifies competition. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 441 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 520 points. Shanghai Jiao Tong University's main campus is located in Shanghai, not a local university in Fujian Province. Its enrollment proportion in Fujian Province is about 3.9% (30 out of 759 nationally in 2024), which is moderately low, so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking trend of 305–308 in 2024–2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the approximately 6% increase in Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province intensifying competition, the university's top-tier level maintaining strong appeal, and the slightly negative reputation having a mild inhibitory effect, taking into account the intensified competition due to the expansion of the examinee pool, the predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 323, a slight decline (larger ranking number) from 2025, with a range of 273–373.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 323, range 273–373. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound of 273 or below can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science Yongqiang Pilot Class, Artificial Intelligence Top Class, IEEE Pilot Class). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 323) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors (Finance Dual Degree, Science Pilot Class Mathematics Direction, Mechanical Qian Xuesen Class, Electrical Siyuan Class), while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound of 373 are advised to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Materials Xu Zuyao Class, Biological Sciences, Chemistry), while also striving for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 67, 52, 54, 125, and 48 respectively. In 2024, due to an increase in enrollment majors (expanded from 1 to 3), the ranking shifted back to 125, but recovered to 48 in 2025, showing overall high volatility with a high-level fluctuation pattern; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 48. The enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 1 person in 2021, 1 in 2022, 1 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 2 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 3 persons, an increase of 1 person (50% expansion) compared to 2025, which helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 4th nationally by Soft Science, belonging to the top-tier university level; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative (academic misconduct incidents); Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot); in 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line, but no significant gaps in recent years. Overall reputation has a neutral to slightly negative impact on application heat; Law is rated A, Journalism and Communication A, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, highly matching the History Category enrollment majors (Law Experimental Class, Humanities Experimental Class), with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity (recommended), while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of Gaokao examinees in Fujian Province in 2026 is approximately 267,900, with an estimated 64,300 History Category examinees based on historical proportions, an increase of about 4,000 (approximately 6.7%) compared to 2025 (60,300), intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool; Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, not a local university in Fujian Province; the number of History Category enrollments in Fujian is extremely small (2–4 persons), with a very low enrollment proportion, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high baseline ranking of 48 in 2025, the 50% enrollment expansion in 2026 (from 2 to 3 persons) reducing competition, the approximately 6.7% increase in Fujian History Category examinees partially offsetting the expansion effect, and the top-tier university level maintaining high attractiveness, given that the expansion rate exceeds the examinee growth rate, the ranking should slightly shift backward (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 67, with a range of 1–96.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)

- Law Experimental Class (Including Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 67, with a range of 17–117. History Category has very few enrollment majors (only 3). Both directions of the Law Experimental Class (International Rule of Law Special Class and Dual Degree Program) are top-tier Law A disciplines; candidates with rankings within the lower bound of 17 can boldly aim for them; those with rankings around the midpoint of 67 have a high probability of admission to both Law directions; candidates with rankings near the upper bound of 117 are advised to use the Humanities Experimental Class as a safety option.
